description_long: This is a large, vintage-style wooden desk with a dark brown leather or faux-leather writing surface bordered by a gold-embossed trim. The desk features a total of seven drawers, three on each side and one central drawer, all equipped with black metal bar handles. The side drawers are partially open, revealing their depth and storage capacity, while the central drawer is closed. The frame and legs are constructed from a darker wood or painted black, providing a sturdy and classic appearance. The back and sides of the desk are paneled, with no visible openings or additional features. This piece is well-suited for use in an office or study, offering ample storage and a spacious work surface.
description: A large, vintage wooden desk with a dark brown leather writing surface, gold trim, and seven drawers with black metal handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven drawers, with three on each side and one central drawer, and the detailed writing surface.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the partially open drawers on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood paneling and the absence of drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right set of drawers, similar to the left, with a clear view of the desk's thickness.
